title: Land's Utilities
description: Universal block/cable facades, remote controls for out-of-range chests/machines, fluid XP utilities, and more!
body:
# Land's Utilities

A hodgepodge of useful utilities - remote inventory accessors, fluid XP anvils, and more to come! GuideME (when installed) documentation available in-game.

Discord: [https://discord.gg/aXQExaHfgR](https://discord.gg/aXQExaHfgR)

## Items

*   Remote Control - this lets you access block menus even when you can't reach the block directly. Shift-right-click on a block to add it to the remote control, shift-scroll to cycle between blocks, and right-click to access the block menu remotely. You can also enchant the remote control in an enchanting table or anvil to increase the maximum number of blocks stored as well as the range (up to anywhere in the same dimension at max level). You can also edit and delete blocks stored with `/landsutilities rename_link <name>` or `/landsutilities delete_link` respectively.
*   Redstone Wand - shift-right-click on a block to make it act akin to a redstone block/lever/button depending on the wand's current mode (which can be changed by shift-scrolling). Useful for secret bases.
*   \[26.1 only, planned backport\] Facade Wand - disguise blocks as other ones, useful for hiding cables and such

## Machines

*   Auto Anvil - this functions like a vanilla anvil except that it is automatable and takes liquid experience (from any mod) from an adjacent tank (by default, above the anvil) instead of from the player. Do NOT pipe liquid XP into the anvil directly; instead pipe it into the adjacent tank.
*   \[26.1 only\] XP Collector - collects XP and stores it in the connected tank as fluid XP
*   \[26.1 only\] XP Interface - like a fluid XP tank, but players can also retrieve/store levels from the menu
*  \[26.1 only\] Interfacer - simulates left/right clicks at a target location in range
